allow: PowerShell($cred = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill; $token = \($cred | Where-Object { $_ -match '^password=' }\) -replace '^password='; $issues = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/beyerl/history-mystery/issues?state=open&per_page=100" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $issues | Where-Object { -not $_.pull_request } | ForEach-Object { "ISSUE #$\($_.number\): $\($_.title\)`n$\($_.body\)`n========" })

PowerShell($files = 'business-logic/translation-service.js','pages/start-page.js','pages/game-setup-page.js','pages/join-game-page.js','pages/player-registration.js','pages/credits-page.js','pages/game-page.js','pages/game-scores-page.js','pages/tutorial-page.js','components/event-modal.js','components/drag-drop-list.js','components/mute-button.js','data/translations.js'; foreach \($f in $files\) { node --check "WebFrontend/wwwroot/$f"; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { "FAIL: $f" } }; "syntax check done")

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== .i18n-temp ==="; if \(Test-Path .i18n-temp\) { Get-ChildItem .i18n-temp | ForEach-Object { "{0}  {1} bytes" -f $_.Name, $_.Length } } else { "\(none\)" }; Write-Output "=== event-translations ==="; if \(Test-Path WebFrontend/wwwroot/data/event-translations\) { Get-ChildItem WebFrontend/wwwroot/data/event-translations | ForEach-Object { "{0}  {1} bytes" -f $_.Name, $_.Length } } else { "\(none\)" })

PowerShell($cred = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n" | git credential fill; $token = \($cred | Where-Object { $_ -match '^password=' }\) -replace '^password='; $issue = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/beyerl/history-mystery/issues/6" -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; "TITLE: $\($issue.title\)`nUPDATED: $\($issue.updated_at\)`n`n$\($issue.body\)")

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/beyerl/history-mystery/issues?state=open&per_page=100" -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="claude" }\) | Select-Object number,title,@{n='labels';e={\($_.labels.name\) -join ','}} | Sort-Object number | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200 } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($t = $env:GH_TOKEN; if\(-not $t\){$t=$env:GITHUB_TOKEN}; if\(-not $t\){"no env token"} else {"have token"}; try { \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/beyerl/history-mystery" -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="claude" }\) | Select-Object full_name,private,visibility | Format-List } catch { "repo fetch: " + $_.Exception.Message })
